name_jp: シスメックス株式会社
summary_en: Board authorised a ¥15bn buyback covering up to 6,000,000 shares (1.4% of S/O), to be executed by 2026-12-31. First buyback of meaningful size since FY22.
summary_jp: 自己株式600万株（発行済の1.4%）上限150億円を2026年12月31日まで取得決議。

name_jp: シスメックス株式会社
summary_en: Cancellation of 2,500,000 treasury shares (0.6% of S/O), effective 2025-10-15. Follows the FY24 buyback programme and reduces treasury holdings to under 1% of issued shares.
summary_jp: 自己株式250万株（発行済の0.6%）を2025年10月15日付で消却。
